rationale: Multi-factor analysis correctly identifies structural resonance interacting with feedback-loop bandwidth, covers contributing factors (sampling delay, filtering lag, quantization, fixture mismatch), lists symptoms and multiple mitigations, but lacks calibrated confidence markers on claims and explicit trade-off comparison between mitigation options.
rubric_evidence: sampling delay, filtering lag, and quantization can worsen the phase shift
especially when PID gains are increased after bench tests on a stiffer fixture
Typical mitigations are lowering loop bandwidth, adding notch filters at the resonant mode, improving mounting stiffness or damping, and re-identifying the plant on the real hardware
